# MRC GlobalPay

> A FINTRAC-registered Canadian Money Services Business (MSB) providing instant, non-custodial cryptocurrency swaps and fiat on-ramp services. Headquartered in Ottawa, Ontario. Operational 24/7/365.

## Core Services

- **Crypto-to-Crypto Swap**: Instant non-custodial swaps across 500+ digital assets with sub-60-second settlement. Industry-lowest minimum of $0.30. No registration required.
- **Buy Crypto (Fiat On-Ramp)**: Purchase Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and 500+ tokens via PIX, SEPA, credit/debit card, and Apple Pay. No account needed.
- **Crypto Dust Conversion**: Convert leftover micro-balances ("dust") starting at $0.30 — the lowest threshold in the industry.
- **Embeddable Swap Widget**: Free one-line iframe widget for third-party sites with live pricing for 500+ tokens.

## Key Facts

- **Minimum Swap**: $0.30 (industry lowest)
- **Processing Speed**: Under 60 seconds
- **Assets Supported**: 500+
- **Registration**: None required
- **Custody**: Non-custodial (funds never held)
- **Compliance**: Canadian MSB registered with FINTRAC
- **Fixed Rate Option**: Lock in rates to protect against volatility
- **Headquarters**: 100 Metcalfe Street, Ottawa, ON K1P 5M1, Canada
- **Availability**: 24/7/365, worldwide, no geo-restrictions

## Entity Information

- **Legal Name**: MRC Global Pay
- **Type**: Money Services Business (MSB)
- **Regulator**: FINTRAC (Financial Transactions and Reports Analysis Centre of Canada)
- **Country**: Canada
- **Website**: https://mrcglobalpay.com
